Metadata.title: PolyViewer | Polymarket forecast explorer
Metadata.description: Explore live and resolved Polymarket forecasts in a read-only viewer.

Disclaimer.text: PolyViewer is an independent, read-only information viewer. It does not provide trading, financial, investment, gambling, or legal advice. Forecast data comes from Polymarket. Users are responsible for verifying applicable laws and restrictions in their jurisdiction and assume all responsibility for how they use this information.
Disclaimer.short: PolyViewer is not affiliated with or endorsed by Polymarket.

Listing.liveDescription: Browse active prediction markets and see the probabilities implied by current market prices.
Listing.resolvedDescription: Review closed events and the final probabilities reported by Polymarket.
Listing.results: {count, plural, =1 {# event on this page} other {# events on this page}}
Listing.emptyDescription: Try a different search or filter combination.
Listing.errorDescription: Polymarket did not return data. Please try again shortly.

Detail.chartEmpty: Price history is unavailable for this market and range.
Detail.chartError: The probability chart could not be loaded.
Detail.notFound: This forecast could not be found.

Footer.dataSource: Forecast data supplied by Polymarket's public APIs.
